title: Wildstead
description: Wildstead is a Vanilla+ Fabric 1.21.1 modpack focused on immersive farming, enhanced world generation, village expansion, and balanced survival progression. A cozy, performance-optimized experience designed for long-term survival gameplay.
body:
![Click Me](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16bf6acccc230ae42482c1cffe8450ee4cf1ad3f.png)[Click Me For Server](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=1393)

Wildstead is a grounded, immersive vanilla-overhaul for Minecraft 1.21.1 (Fabric) built around slow survival, meaningful progression, and rustic homestead living.

Settle fertile valleys, expand your farmstead, and turn a simple shelter into a thriving countryside estate. Wildstead enhances exploration, farming, villages, and world generation while preserving the core Minecraft identity. It focuses on balance, performance, and long-term survival depth—without tech bloat or overpowered gear.

🌱 What Wildstead Offers [Wildstead Landing Page](https://wildstead.site/)

Expanded biome variety with natural terrain shaping

Improved villages and structure exploration

Deep farming and cooking progression

Rustic building options and cozy interiors

Balanced gear expansion without breaking vanilla

Performance-optimized Fabric setup

Shader-ready visuals

Wildstead is designed to feel like:

Vanilla Minecraft — evolved.

Not a kitchen-sink pack.
Not a tech grind.
Not fantasy RPG chaos.

Just a living world built for homesteaders.
